title: Graphene 101
description: You can buy my book  Graphene 101 An Inventors guide to making graphene at https://www.smashwords.com/books/view/304668 the money will help my research. thanks. I know this video is a bit 'talky' and relatively long but I have been asked quite a few times to give somekind of background and overview of the graphene production method. So here it is and I hope it helps. Bear in mind - this is just my take on things - If you have a different view of what's going on I am not in the least bit surprised and by all means make a video and post it.I would be fascinated to hear your viewpoint. Anyway, hopefully it is of interest and helps
